title: Task + focus + log
content: Todo trabajo empieza con task reclamada, focus declarado y cierre en log.

title: Integration dossier
content: Toda integracion compleja arranca con dossier, riesgos y fallback.

title: Vertical slice first
content: En juegos y productos complejos, validar primero una version recortada y operable.

title: React.memo with useCallback
content: Componentes grandes con handlers deben usar memo() + useCallback() para evitar re-renders innecesarios.

title: Tier-based rate limiting
content: Rate limiting diferenciado por tier (FREE/PRO/ELITE) con tabla rateLimits en Convex.

title: Knowledge schema normalization
content: Knowledge entries usan schema unificado: id, content, domain, confidence, trustScore, freshness, validatedBy, reuseCount.

title: Fake timers for async tests
content: Tests con async/retry usan vi.useFakeTimers() + vi.runAllTimersAsync() para control deterministic.

pattern: When modifying schema, always check for breaking changes and update dependent mutations/queries
Viral growth features need backend tracking + frontend UI + milestone rewards
Gamification needs XP system + levels + rewards + progress visualization
